title: Polish Beef Stew
description: A hearty beef stew with a crunchy twist, inspired by traditional polish cuisine. This recipe is perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the beef on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
Add the sausage to the pot and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the carrots, potatoes, beef broth, tomato paste, and Worcestershire sauce. Stir to combine.
Return the beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the meat is tender, about 2 hours.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or dill, if desired.
